summary: Cargo is moving on plan with no open operational exceptions.

issues.title: Customs hold on active ingredient certificate
issues.detail: Border review flagged a mismatch between the uploaded certificate and the carton batch number.
issues.action: Upload corrected certificate before 3:00 PM ET to avoid a 24-hour delay.

issues.title: Temperature logger check required
